name: Excalidraw Drawing
description: A collaborative drawing canvas powered by Excalidraw with OT content sync, persistent configuration, and an LLM command surface

charmiq.command.name: getText
charmiq.command.description: Return the raw Excalidraw JSON stored in appContent

charmiq.command.name: setText
charmiq.command.description: Replace the Excalidraw scene by writing new JSON to appContent

charmiq.command.name: getSceneElements
charmiq.command.description: Return the current Excalidraw scene elements array

charmiq.command.name: getSceneState
charmiq.command.description: Return the current Excalidraw scene state (zoom, cursor, background, etc.)

charmiq.command.name: getConfig
charmiq.command.description: Return the current drawing configuration from appState

charmiq.command.name: setConfig
charmiq.command.description: Merge partial drawing configuration into appState

showMainMenu.description: Show or hide the Excalidraw main menu
